assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with gcloud describe command for versions, kubectl get nodes for node status, kubectl get pods for health checks, and system pod verification

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 1.2 includes 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone us-west1-b --format="yaml(channels)" | grep -A 10 "REGULAR"' to check available versions in Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Step 1.3 includes 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated' command to check for deprecated API usage

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Step 2.1 provides 'gcloud container clusters upgrade CLUSTER_NAME --zone us-west1-b --master --cluster-version 1.33' command with both --master flag and --cluster-version

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Steps 2.2 and 2.3 include verification with gcloud describe command showing expected 1.33.x version and kubectl commands to test API access

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Steps 3.2 and 3.6 provide exact gcloud node pool upgrade commands for both default-pool and workload-pool, upgrading directly from 1.32 to 1.33 (skip-level upgrade)

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Steps 3.3 and 3.7 include 'watch kubectl get nodes -o wide' and 'kubectl get pods -A | grep -E "Pending|Terminating|CrashLoop"' to monitor upgrade progress

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The runbook shows control plane upgrade from 1.32 to 1.33, and node pool upgrades also go directly from 1.32 to 1.33 (skip-level approach)

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 4 includes comprehensive validation with gcloud describe for versions, kubectl get nodes, kubectl get pods for health, and application functionality checks

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes 'Emergency Rollback' section with gcloud operations cancel command and explains limitations of rollback for control plane and completed node pool upgrades
